# Story 1.2: Hạ tầng PostgreSQL + Prisma Foundation Schema + First Migration

Status: done

<!-- Generated by BMad create-story workflow on 2026-05-10. Ultimate context engine analysis completed - comprehensive developer guide created. -->

## Story

As a developer,  
I want chạy PostgreSQL 16 cục bộ qua Docker Compose và có Prisma schema với các bảng nền tảng,  
so that backend có database hoạt động và schema sẵn sàng cho seed data ở Story 1.4, GET `/menu` read ở Story 2.1, và CRUD endpoints ở Epic 3.

## Acceptance Criteria

1. **PostgreSQL dev DB:** Given Docker Desktop đã chạy, when developer chạy `docker compose up -d` ở `pos-api/`, then PostgreSQL 16 lên ở port `5432` với volume persistent, and healthcheck thành công sau ≤30s.
2. **Prisma foundation schema:** Given Prisma đã init, when developer mở `pos-api/prisma/schema.prisma`, then schema chứa model naming đúng convention: PascalCase model, camelCase field, `@@map` snake_case table, `@map` snake_case column, UUID columns là `String @db.Uuid`.
3. **Auth foundation models:** Schema có `Tenant`, `Store`, `User`, `RefreshToken` với fields:
   - `Tenant`: `id`, `name`, `createdAt`, `updatedAt`
   - `Store`: `id`, `tenantId`, `name`, `code` (vd `POS01`), `createdAt`, `updatedAt`
   - `User`: `id`, `tenantId`, `storeId`, `email`, `passwordHash`, `role Role { Admin, Cashier }`, `isRevoked Boolean @default(false)`, `createdAt`, `updatedAt`
   - `RefreshToken`: `id`, `userId`, `tokenHash`, `expiresAt`, `revokedAt?`, `createdAt`
4. **Menu read-side foundation models:** Schema có `Category`, `Product`, `OptionGroup`, `Option`, `ProductOptionGroup` với fields và relations theo epics; menu business tables có `tenantId`, `storeId`, timestamps; `ProductOptionGroup` dùng PK composite `(productId, optionGroupId)`.
5. **Versioning model:** Schema có `MenuVersion`: `id`, `tenantId`, `storeId`, `version Int @default(1)`, `bumpedAt`; unique `(tenantId, storeId)`.
6. **Constraints and indexes:** Migration SQL enforce các rule quan trọng: unique/index names theo convention, `min_select <= max_select`, `price_vnd >= 0`, integer VND fields, indexes `idx_products_category_id`, `idx_products_is_active`, `idx_options_option_group_id`, unique `uq_categories_tenant_store_name`, unique `uq_menu_versions_tenant_store`, and scoped user email unique.
7. **First migration:** Given schema đã chốt, when developer chạy `npx prisma migrate dev --name init`, then migration được tạo trong `pos-api/prisma/migrations/` với SQL hợp lệ and database được apply không lỗi.
8. **Prisma generate/build:** Given `.env.example` đã có `DATABASE_URL`, when developer copy sang `.env`, chạy `npx prisma generate`, then Prisma Client TypeScript được generate and import/use từ NestJS app build pass.
9. **Prisma validation/format:** Given schema đã apply, when developer chạy `npx prisma validate` và `npx prisma format`, then cả hai pass không warning.
10. **Verification gates:** `npm run typecheck`, `npm run lint`, `npm test`, `npm run build` trong `pos-api/` pass sau khi thêm Prisma/Docker files.

## Tasks / Subtasks

- [x] Cài và cấu hình Prisma 7 cho `pos-api` (AC: 2, 8, 9)
  - [x] Add dependencies/devDependencies: `@prisma/client@7.x`, `prisma@7.x`; dùng phiên bản hiện tại đã kiểm tra là `7.8.0` nếu không có lý do pin khác.
  - [x] Chạy/init Prisma tạo `prisma/schema.prisma`; giữ `DATABASE_URL` trong `.env.example` hiện có, không commit `.env` thật.
  - [x] Add/verify scripts tiện dụng trong `pos-api/package.json`: `prisma:validate`, `prisma:format`, `prisma:generate`, `migrate:dev` hoặc tài liệu README nếu không thêm script.
- [x] Thêm Docker Compose PostgreSQL 16 trong `pos-api/` (AC: 1)
  - [x] Tạo `pos-api/docker-compose.yml` với service PostgreSQL 16, port `5432:5432`, database `pos_dev`, user/password dev local, named volume persistent.
  - [x] Thêm healthcheck bằng `pg_isready` với interval/retries đủ để healthy ≤30s.
  - [x] Không đưa cấu hình production hoặc secret thật vào compose.
- [x] Thiết kế Prisma foundation schema (AC: 2–6)
  - [x] Models auth: `Tenant`, `Store`, `User`, `RefreshToken`; enum `Role { Admin Cashier }`.
  - [x] Models menu: `Category`, `Product`, `OptionGroup`, `Option`, `ProductOptionGroup`.
  - [x] Model versioning: `MenuVersion`.
  - [x] Apply `@@map`/`@map` để DB snake_case plural, Prisma PascalCase/camelCase.
  - [x] Add relations, foreign keys, cascading behavior có chủ đích; tránh cascade delete làm mất dữ liệu nền tảng ngoài phạm vi.
  - [x] Add indexes/unique constraints với tên map rõ ràng theo convention.
  - [x] Add SQL check constraints trong migration nếu Prisma schema chưa biểu diễn được đầy đủ (`min_select <= max_select`, `price_vnd >= 0`).
- [x] Giải quyết UUID v7 đúng kiến trúc (AC: 2–6)
  - [x] **Không dùng `@default(uuid())` nếu mục tiêu là UUID v7**, vì Prisma `uuid()` sinh UUID v4. Dùng `String @db.Uuid` và generate UUID v7 ở application/seed layer bằng `uuidv7()` trong các story tạo dữ liệu, hoặc ghi rõ quyết định kỹ thuật nếu chọn DB function extension.
  - [x] Nếu migration cần default DB tạm thời, phải chứng minh default đó sinh v7; nếu không, không đặt default.
  - [x] Add Dev Note/README ngắn để Story 1.4 seed và service sau này biết phải tự truyền UUID v7.
- [x] Tạo và apply migration đầu tiên (AC: 7)
  - [x] Chạy `docker compose up -d` trong `pos-api/` và xác nhận container healthy.
  - [x] Chạy `npx prisma migrate dev --name init`.
  - [x] Inspect SQL migration để xác nhận table/column names, indexes, uniques, check constraints đúng convention.
- [x] Wire Prisma Client tối thiểu vào NestJS build (AC: 8, 10)
  - [x] Tạo `src/prisma/prisma.module.ts` và `src/prisma/prisma.service.ts` tối thiểu nếu cần để import `PrismaClient`; **chỉ baseline client**, chưa implement `$extends` multi-tenant của Story 1.3.
  - [x] Import `PrismaModule` vào `AppModule` nếu service được tạo; không thêm business logic vào `common/`.
  - [x] Add unit smoke test hoặc giữ app tests pass sau import.
- [x] Cập nhật tài liệu và hygiene (AC: 1, 8–10)
  - [x] Cập nhật `pos-api/README.md` với Docker/Prisma commands: `docker compose up -d`, copy `.env.example` → `.env`, `npx prisma migrate dev --name init`, `npx prisma generate`, `npx prisma validate`.
  - [x] Verify `.gitignore` exclude `.env`, `dist/`, `coverage/`, `node_modules/`; migration files **phải commit**, generated client/node_modules **không commit**.
- [x] Chạy verification gates (AC: 7–10)
  - [x] `npx prisma validate`
  - [x] `npx prisma format --check` hoặc `npx prisma format` + diff sạch
  - [x] `npx prisma generate`
  - [x] `npm run typecheck`
  - [x] `npm run lint`
  - [x] `npm test`
  - [x] `npm run build`

## Dev Notes

### Scope boundaries

- Story này là backend/database foundation only. Không seed demo data (Story 1.4), không auth endpoints (Story 1.5), không multi-tenant `$extends` middleware/ProblemDetails/Pino/health (Story 1.3), không orders schema (Story 2.6), không frontend work. [Source: `_bmad-output/planning-artifacts/epics.md#Story 1.2`]
- Story 1.2 cố ý tạo broad menu foundation schema trước first-use để hỗ trợ seed/demo, GET `/menu` ở Story 2.1 và CRUD admin Epic 3; không tách menu schema sang story sau trừ khi có Correct Course. [Source: `_bmad-output/planning-artifacts/epics.md#Story 1.2`]

### Existing code/current state to preserve

- `pos-api/` đã được scaffold ở Story 1.1 bằng NestJS 11, strict TypeScript, Jest, ESLint/Prettier. Current `src/app.module.ts` chỉ import controller/service baseline; đừng phá smoke app hiện có. [Source: `_bmad-output/implementation-artifacts/1-1-khoi-tao-2-repo-pos-web-pwa-pos-api-nestjs-voi-baseline-tooling.md#Dev-Agent-Record`]
- `pos-api/.env.example` đã có `DATABASE_URL`, `JWT_SECRET`, `COOKIE_SECRET`, `CSRF_SECRET`, `NODE_ENV`; chỉ chỉnh nếu cần cho Prisma dev, không commit `.env`. [Source: `pos-api/.env.example`]
- `pos-api/package.json` scripts hiện có `build`, `start:dev`, `dev`, `lint`, `test`, `test:e2e`, `typecheck`. Add Prisma scripts additive only; không rename/break existing scripts. [Source: `pos-api/package.json`]
- `pos-api/tsconfig.json` đã strict với `module: nodenext`, `strict`, `noUncheckedIndexedAccess`, `exactOptionalPropertyTypes`; Prisma/Nest imports phải pass trong setup này. [Source: `pos-api/tsconfig.json`]

### Architecture compliance and critical guardrails

- Stack locked: NestJS 11.x, Prisma 7.x, PostgreSQL 16, TypeScript strict. Không tự đổi ORM/DB/framework. [Source: `_bmad-output/project-context.md#1-Technology-Stack--Versions`]
- DB naming: tables snake_case plural; columns snake_case; PK `id`; FK `<singular>_id`; indexes `idx_<table>_<column>`; uniques `uq_<table>_<columns>`. Prisma layer: model PascalCase singular, fields camelCase. [Source: `_bmad-output/project-context.md#3-Naming-Convention-4-Boundary`]
- Business tables must include tenant/store scope unless explicitly root auth: `Tenant` and `Store` are root; `User` includes tenant/store; menu tables include tenant/store. [Source: `_bmad-output/planning-artifacts/epics.md#Story 1.2`]
- VND money fields are integer only (`priceVnd`, `priceDeltaVnd`); do not use Decimal/Float for VND. [Source: `_bmad-output/project-context.md#2-Quy-tắc-Bắt-buộc-Thi-hành`]
- Snapshot/order immutability is not implemented here because order tables are out of scope; avoid adding order tables early. [Source: `_bmad-output/project-context.md#2-Quy-tắc-Bắt-buộc-Thi-hành`]
- Multi-tenant query enforcement via Prisma `$extends` is Story 1.3. If creating `PrismaService` now, keep it minimal and clearly mark `$extends` TODO for Story 1.3; do not fake completion. [Source: `_bmad-output/planning-artifacts/epics.md#Story 1.3`]

### UUID v7 resolution (important)

- Architecture mandates UUID v7 via `uuid@11+` / `uuidv7()`, not UUID v4. [Source: `_bmad-output/project-context.md#1-Technology-Stack--Versions`; `_bmad-output/project-context.md#2-Quy-tắc-Bắt-buộc-Thi-hành`]
- Epics AC text says `id String @id @default(uuid()) UUID v7`, but Prisma `uuid()` is UUID v4. Treat this as a source conflict. The safer implementation is: `id String @id @db.Uuid` with application/seed layer supplying `uuidv7()` values later. If developer chooses otherwise, they must document and test that generated IDs are v7-compatible.
- Do not install latest `uuid@14` unless all downstream code is checked; project context locked `uuid 11.x`. For this story, `uuid` package is not required unless you add tests/helpers that generate IDs. [Source: `_bmad-output/project-context.md#1-Technology-Stack--Versions`]

### Suggested schema shape

Use this as an implementation guide, not a copy-paste substitute; run `prisma format` after editing.

```prisma
enum Role {
  Admin
  Cashier
}

model Tenant {
  id        String   @id @db.Uuid
  name      String
  stores    Store[]
  users     User[]
  createdAt DateTime @default(now()) @map("created_at") @db.Timestamptz(6)
  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt @map("updated_at") @db.Timestamptz(6)

  @@map("tenants")
}
```

Key mappings to include:

- `Store`: `@@map("stores")`, `code`, unique `(tenantId, code)` recommended as `uq_stores_tenant_code`.
- `User`: `@@map("users")`, `passwordHash @map("password_hash")`, `isRevoked @default(false) @map("is_revoked")`, scoped unique `(tenantId, email)` or `(tenantId, storeId, email)` per implementation choice; choose and document. Epics says email unique scoped, architecture says multi-tenant/store scoping.
- `RefreshToken`: `@@map("refresh_tokens")`, `tokenHash`, `expiresAt`, `revokedAt`.
- `Category`: `@@map("categories")`, unique `(tenantId, storeId, name)` mapped `uq_categories_tenant_store_name`.
- `Product`: `priceVnd @map("price_vnd")`, `isActive`, `categoryId`, indexes mapped `idx_products_category_id`, `idx_products_is_active`.
- `OptionGroup`: `isRequired`, `minSelect`, `maxSelect`, check `min_select <= max_select` in SQL migration.
- `Option`: `priceDeltaVnd`, `isDefault`, `isActive`, index `idx_options_option_group_id`; `price_delta_vnd` can be negative later for discount-like options per Epic 3.4, so do **not** add `price_delta_vnd >= 0` unless product decision confirms non-negative only.
- `ProductOptionGroup`: composite id `@@id([productId, optionGroupId])`, `@@map("product_option_groups")`.
- `MenuVersion`: unique `(tenantId, storeId)` mapped `uq_menu_versions_tenant_store`, `bumpedAt @default(now()) @map("bumped_at")`.

### Migration SQL notes

- Prisma may not emit all CHECK constraints from schema. Add explicit SQL in generated migration after reviewing:
  - `ALTER TABLE option_groups ADD CONSTRAINT chk_option_groups_min_max CHECK (min_select <= max_select);`
  - `ALTER TABLE products ADD CONSTRAINT chk_products_price_vnd_nonnegative CHECK (price_vnd >= 0);`
  - Consider `max_select >= 1` and `min_select >= 0` if DB design allows enforcing.
- Use Postgres `timestamptz` for date/time (`@db.Timestamptz`). API format later is ISO 8601 UTC. [Source: `_bmad-output/project-context.md#2-Quy-tắc-Bắt-buộc-Thi-hành`]
- If using UUID columns without DB default, migration can still create valid `uuid` columns; seed/application must insert IDs explicitly.

### File structure requirements

Expected new/updated files:

```text
pos-api/
├── docker-compose.yml                 # NEW: PostgreSQL 16 dev service + volume + healthcheck
├── prisma/
│   ├── schema.prisma                  # NEW: source of truth schema
│   └── migrations/<timestamp>_init/   # NEW: committed first migration SQL
├── src/prisma/
│   ├── prisma.module.ts               # NEW optional/minimal for build import
│   └── prisma.service.ts              # NEW optional/minimal; no Story 1.3 $extends yet
├── src/app.module.ts                  # UPDATE only if importing PrismaModule
├── package.json                       # UPDATE deps/scripts
├── package-lock.json                  # UPDATE lockfile
├── .env.example                       # UPDATE only if needed, no secrets
└── README.md                          # UPDATE Docker/Prisma commands
```

Do not modify `pos-web/` in this story.

[Source: `_bmad-output/implementation-artifacts/1-1-khoi-tao-2-repo-pos-web-pwa-pos-api-nestjs-voi-baseline-tooling.md#Code-Review-Results`]

### Git intelligence

- Recent commit `cb641e8 us 1-1` contains the scaffolded `pos-api`/`pos-web` baseline and Story 1.1 completion. Follow its established pattern: additive changes, npm lockfiles committed, Dev Agent Record updated in story file when implementing.

### Latest technical notes

- Local registry check on 2026-05-10 returned `prisma@7.8.0` and `@prisma/client@7.8.0`; use Prisma 7.x per architecture. If install resolves newer 7.x, verify no breaking CLI/schema behavior before committing.
- PostgreSQL image should be `postgres:16` (not `latest`) to avoid accidental major upgrade.
- Docker Compose v2 command is `docker compose`, not legacy `docker-compose`.

### Testing and verification requirements

- Minimum gates before moving to review:
  - `cd pos-api && docker compose up -d`
  - Verify DB health: `docker compose ps` or `pg_isready` inside service.
  - `npx prisma validate`
  - `npx prisma format` (then inspect diff)
  - `npx prisma migrate dev --name init`
  - `npx prisma generate`
  - `npm run typecheck`
  - `npm run lint`
  - `npm test`
  - `npm run build`
- Add a small Prisma schema smoke test only if needed to keep confidence high; do not overbuild repository/business tests here because business logic starts in later stories.

## Validation Notes

- Checklist review applied: story prevents wrong UUID version, wrong DB naming, wrong file locations, scope creep into Story 1.3/1.4/2.6, broken existing NestJS gates, and secret leakage.
- Main source conflict found: epics mention `@default(uuid())` while architecture mandates UUID v7. This story explicitly resolves toward architecture: app/seed-supplied UUID v7, no Prisma v4 default.
- Story is ready for `dev-story` implementation.

Không có finding cần sửa/defer; review sạch.

### Debug Log References

- 2026-05-10: Loaded BMad dev-story workflow customization and project config.
- 2026-05-10: Installed Prisma 7.8.0 packages, added Prisma config/schema, generated and applied initial migration against local PostgreSQL 16.
- 2026-05-10: Ran verification gates: Docker Compose health, Prisma validate/format/generate, typecheck, lint, Jest, build.

### Completion Notes List

- Added PostgreSQL 16 Docker Compose dev service with persistent named volume and `pg_isready` healthcheck; verified container reached healthy state.
- Added Prisma 7.8.0 foundation schema using PascalCase models/camelCase fields mapped to snake_case plural tables/columns.
- Implemented auth foundation models (`Tenant`, `Store`, `User`, `RefreshToken`), menu foundation models (`Category`, `Product`, `OptionGroup`, `Option`, `ProductOptionGroup`), and `MenuVersion`.
- Enforced key indexes/uniques and migration-level CHECK constraints for `min_select <= max_select`, non-negative/positive option selection bounds, and `price_vnd >= 0`.
- Resolved UUID v7 conflict by keeping UUID columns as `String @db.Uuid` without Prisma `uuid()` defaults; README documents that seed/application layers must supply UUID v7 later.
- Added minimal global `PrismaModule`/`PrismaService` and imported it into `AppModule`; no Story 1.3 multi-tenant `$extends` logic added.
- Updated README with Docker/Prisma local workflow and hygiene notes; `.env` was used locally for migration/generate and removed from workspace.
- Verification passed: `docker compose ps` healthy, `npx prisma validate`, `npx prisma format`, `npx prisma migrate reset --force`, `npx prisma generate`, `npm run typecheck`, `npm run lint`, `npm test -- --runInBand`, `npm run build`.
